# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
---
apiVersion: apps/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: linkerd
  name: server
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: server
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
        prometheus.io/port: "8080"
    spec:
      containers:
        - image: docker.io/linkerdio/linkerd-proxy-init:v1.4.5
          name: proxy-init
        - image: docker.io/library/nginx:latest
          name: httpd
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: server
---
apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
metadata:
   name: server-authorization.policy.linkerd.io
spec:
  group: policy.linkerd.io
  version: v1alpha1
  scope: Namespaced
  names:
    plural: serverauthorizations
    singular: serverauthorization
    kind: ServerAuthorization
    shortNames:
      - sauth
    categories:
      - all
      - linkerd
      - k8s
---
apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: port-allocation.policy.linkerd.io
spec:
  group: policy.linkerd.io
  version: v1alpha1
  scope: Namespaced
  names:
    plural: portallocations
    singular: portallocation
    kind: PortAllocation
    shortNames:
      - pauth
    categories:
      - all
      - linkerd
      - k8s
---
apiVersion: security.devops.platform.ibmcloud/v1beta1
kind: NamespaceAuthorization
metadata:
  name: linkerd-ns-authorizations
spec:
  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "linkerd"
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector: {}
---
apiVersion: security.devops.platform.ibmcloud/v1beta1
kind: NamespaceAuthorization
metadata:
  name: linkerd-ns-authorizations2
spec:
  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "linkerd"
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "microservices"
---
apiVersion: security.devops.platform.ibmcloud/v1beta1
kind: NamespaceAuthorization
metadata:
  name: linkerd-ns-authorizations3
spec:
  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector: {}
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "linkerd"
---

metadata:
  name: linkerd-ns-authorizations4
spec:
  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector: {}
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "linkerd"
---

  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector: {}
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:
    matchLabels:
      ns: "linkerd"

  allowNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector: {}
  denyNetworkTrafficFromNamespaceSelector:

      ns: "linkerd"
